prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约为 9543→7427→7376→9143→10556 名，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移的波动趋势；2025 年较 2024 年后移约 1413 名，基准位次约 10556 名，近两年后移幅度显著；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年各 3 人，2024 年增至 9 人，2025 年增至 10 人；2026 年计划 11 人，较 2025 年扩招 1 人（+10%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字倾向增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年排名约第 28 名，属国内顶尖高校梯队，对考生有较强吸引力；大连理工大学近年声誉信号偏负面：2021 年涉及校园安全事件，2024 年涉及录取断档信号，2026 年声誉评价仍为偏负面（录取断档相关）；抖音热度排名第 55 位（较热），有一定短视频曝光但非高热。整体声誉偏负面可能对报考热度产生一定压制；共享大连理工大学本部学科评估结果：化学工程与技术 A+、力学 A、土木工程 A、工商管理 A、机械工程 A、管理科学与工程 A、软件工程 A 等 10 个 A- 及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 招生专业中能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术 A+，但属生化环材大类（社会热度明显劝退）；经济学类属金融财经大类（社会热度分化观望）。本省 2026 年物理类考生约 13.7 万人（按近年占比估算），较 2025 年约 13.95 万人略减约 0.18%，竞争微降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+10%）、声誉偏负面压制报考热度、以及本省考生总数微降等因素，在 2025 年基准 10556 名基础上预计位次继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约 11219 名，区间 10719–11719 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（含电子商务、经济学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（该校在重庆物理类仅设 2 个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 10719–11719 名内，建议以二档经济学类为主力报考、一档能源化学工程作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<10719）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>11719）需谨慎考虑。两 专业均属大连理工大学强势学科方向，学科底蕴深厚。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9543 → 7427 → 7376 → 9143 → 10556, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, and then significantly dropping; in 2025, it shifted back by about 1413 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 10556, and the backward shift has been significant in the past two years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 3 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 9 in 2024, and to 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11 students, an increase of 1 student (+10%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 28th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, which strongly attracts candidates; Dalian University of Technology has had a somewhat negative reputation signal in recent years: involving a campus safety incident in 2021, an admission cutoff signal in 2024, and the 2026 reputation evaluation remains somewhat negative (related to admission cutoff); Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with some short video exposure but not high heat. The overall somewhat negative reputation may suppress application enthusiasm; shares the discipline evaluation results of Dalian University of Technology main campus: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, and 10 other A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the enrollment majors, Energy Chemical Engineering corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, but belongs to the broader category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials (social popularity is clearly discouraging); Economics belongs to the broader category of Finance and Economics (social popularity is divided and wait-and-see). The number of Physics Category candidates in this province in 2026 is approximately 137,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight decrease of about 0.18% from approximately 139,500 in 2025, slightly reducing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+10%), the somewhat negative reputation suppressing application enthusiasm, and the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the ranking will continue to shift back slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 10556. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11219, with a range of 10719–11719.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
None (the university only offers 2 enrollment majors for Physics Category in Chongqing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10719–11719, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics as the main application and Tier 1 Energy Chemical Engineering as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10719), you can focus on reaching for the top-tier major in Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11719), you need to consider carefully. Both majors belong to the strong discipline directions of Dalian University of Technology, with deep disciplinary foundations.
